chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-293 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 01. For orders on office objection “A” 02. For hearing of main case. 01-09-2025 Mr. Amanullah Luhur, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Murad Tunio, advocate for respondent No.8 Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General a/w Inspector Dali Jan SHO PS Dokri, SIP Ali Dost on behalf of SSP Larkana and ASI Aijaz Ali on behalf of SSP Shikarpur. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General. -------- 1. Petitioner seeks protection as she apprehends danger to her life at the hands of respondent No.6 to 11, who are her relatives and respondent No.8 is her ex-husband. Muhammad Suleman brother of Arbab. 2. The respondent No.8 and 9 are present in person and they submit that the petitioner has contracted 2nd marriage for which they have got no concern and they have never caused any harassment to her but the petitioner without any reasons is dragging them in the courts. The report has been filed by Aijaz Ahmed Thebo SHO police station New faujdari, SSP Larkana and SSP Shikarpur, wherein they have stated that no harassment has been caused to the petitioner and they will provide protection to the petitioner as and when she approaches them. 2. The official respondent are under obligation to provide protection to people in accordance with the law. Since petitioner apprehends danger to her life from her Ex-husband and other family members, therefore, it is expected that she shall be provided protection and private respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will not cause any harassment to the petitioner.

The official respondent are under obligation to provide protection to people in accordance with the law. Since petitioner apprehends danger to her life from her Ex-husband and other family members, therefore, it is expected that she shall be provided protection and private respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. The petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
